ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/serverless-sample-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/serverless-sample-app
Language: hcl
Explore Datadog's serverless observability features with this sample app.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GoogleCloudPlatform/terraform-google-artifact-registry
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/terraform-google-artifact-registry
Language: hcl
Create and manage Artifact Registry repositories

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GoogleCloudPlatform/terraform-google-secret-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/terraform-google-secret-manager
Language: hcl
Creates one or more Google Secret Manager secrets and manages basic permissions for them

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-cloudwatch-logs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-cloudwatch-logs
Language: hcl
Terraform Module to Provide a CloudWatch Logs Endpoint

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-codebuild
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-codebuild
Language: hcl
Terraform Module to easily leverage AWS CodeBuild for Continuous Integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-efs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-aws-efs
Language: hcl
Terraform Module to define an EFS Filesystem (aka NFS)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudposse/terraform-datadog-platform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudposse/terraform-datadog-platform
Language: hcl
Terraform module to configure and provision Datadog monitors, custom RBAC roles with permissions, Datadog synthetic tests, Datadog child organizations, and other Datadog resources from a YAML configuration, complete with automated tests.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mysticaltech/terraform-hcloud-kube-hetzner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mysticaltech/terraform-hcloud-kube-hetzner
Language: hcl
Optimized and Maintenance-free Kubernetes on Hetzner Cloud in one command!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: semgrep/semgrep-rules
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/semgrep/semgrep-rules
Language: hcl
Semgrep Community Edition rules, maintained by Semgrep and the community. Free to use under the Semgrep Rules License.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-eks
Language: hcl
